final:
module top_module(
    input CLK,
    input reset,
    input [3:0] in1,
    input [3:0] in2,
    output reg [3:0] out
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge CLK or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (reset) begin
            out <= 4'd0;
        end else begin
            out <= in1 + in2;
        end
    end

endmodule
